name: Chestnut & Chocolate Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Simmer the peeled chestnuts in water for 20 minutes or until soft. Drain.
2. In a saucepan over gentle heat, combine 1/4 cup cocoa, 1/4 cup sugar, 2 cups milk, and 2 teaspoons butter. Cook, stirring, for 10 minutes. Turn off the heat.
3. Puree the chestnuts and add them to the cocoa mixture along with a beaten egg. Stir well.
4. Pour the mixture into a buttered 1L mold. Place the mold in a pan of hot water and bake in a moderate oven until the pudding is firm, about 45 minutes.
